label: auto-review
comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored) to override. SECRETS are env-only: GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET (webhook HMAC), bot tokens in bot.env/orchestrator.env, Linear in linear*.env. label opts a PR into daemon work; approveLabel only arms approval for already eligible PRs. trustedSenders = GitHub logins allowed to trigger a fix via a PR comment; env QA_TRUSTED_SENDERS (comma-separated) overrides it. linearDecisionComments posts deduped Linear comments explaining each state-machine decision. linearCreateIssues is opt-in because it creates Linear issues for PRs without VIM links.
